WINLINK PACTOR CHANNEL LISTING - (Monday, June 8, 2026 03:43 UTC)
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Frequencies followed by a hash sign (#) are available for PACTOR 3 (and/or 4) connections.

Explanation of codes:
    - = Unknown
    A = Additional information
  Antenna being used:
    B = Beam
    D = Dipole
    V = Vertical
  Internet(details)
    E = Email address of sysop - if not listed, use callsign@winlink.org
    H = Homepage URL

Channel, Sysop Name / Callsign, [Grid], (last update)
-----------------------------------------------------------------
